results.title: Trump says Iran agreed not to develop or acquire nuclear weapons
results.description: Trump says Iran agreed not to develop or acquire nuclear weapons US President Donald Trump said Iran has agreed not only to refrain from developing nuclear weapons but also from acquiring them, describing the provision as a key achievement of ongoing negotiations between Washington and Tehran. Speaking during a call with supporters, Trump said an earlier draft of the agreement addressed the development of nuclear weapons but did not explicitly prohibit their purchase. “They had a clause they won’t develop. I said, ‘What about purchasing?’” Trump said. “Two days later, they agreed to that. We got everything we wanted.” Iran has not publicly confirmed the details of any proposed agreement.

results.title: 'Grifter': GOP senator toppled by Trump lashes out at right-wing activist
results.description: Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX) lashed out on social media at a longtime right-wing activist notorious for his voter registration drives. "Just had a conversation with Senator John Cornyn at the airport," wrote Scott Presler on X. "I was very gracious & asked him to pass the SAVE America Act" — referencing a package of draconian voter restrictions pushed by President Donald Trump. Cornyn replied with a one-word response: "Grifter." Additionally, former Cornyn campaign strategist Matt Mackowiak replied to Presler too, saying , "He’s an original cosponsor (expletive). Flip a no vote." Presler has long boasted about delivering victories for Republicans by going into key states to register new Republicans, although some studies of the areas he set up his drives, like Amish Country in Pennsylvania, cast doubt on the idea he had any more than a negligible impact . The activist has also racked up a string of controversies, including his ties to anti-Muslim hate groups, his involvement with the "Stop the Steal" rallies preceding the Jan. 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol, and his ignominious resignation as field coordinator for the Republican Party of Virginia after reports that he engaged in gay hookups at the Virginia Beach GOP office and posted photos of the encounters to Craigslist.
